_meta.purpose: Demo brief — Alpine Harvest Organic Trail Mix, APAC market. Zen minimalism aesthetic with matcha green tea variant.
_meta.data_origin: Created for Phase A/B final wrap-up.

cultural_context: Japanese-influenced zen minimalism. White and forest green palette with bamboo and stone accents. Clean lines, generous negative space, understated elegance. Communicates purity and natural quality.

products.name: Alpine Harvest Trail Mix
products.description: Clean, pure blend of almonds, macadamia, white sesame seeds, and dried yuzu for a refined snacking experience

products.name: Alpine Harvest Trail Mix
products.description: Delicate matcha-dusted almonds, edamame crisps, and white chocolate chips inspired by Japanese tea ceremony traditions

audience: urban wellness-focused consumers 25-40 in Japan, South Korea, and Southeast Asia
